checks.stdout_tail:
Usage: cli.py post-closure-observability-harvest [OPTIONS]

Emit bounded post-closure observability receipts without reopening the closed queue.

Options:
  -r, --radius INTEGER              Bounded number of observation receipts to emit. [required]
  --source-closure-receipt-id TEXT  Accepted closure review receipt id. [default: 52d0ea8d]
  --label TEXT                      Optional run label.
  -h, --help                        Show this message and exit.
